◎译　　名　女大厨
◎片　　名　The Heat: A Kitchen (R)evolution

　　　　　  罗慕娟 Anita Lo


◎简　　介  

　　在专业烹饪的竞技运动中脱颖而出需要厚颜无耻的个性。女人只有在能承受压力的情况下才能晋升。在“革命”的最前线会见七位女厨师。It takes a brazen personality to excel in the competitive sport of professional cooking. A woman can only ascend the ranks if she can take the heat. Meet seven women chefs at the forefront of a "revolution."
introduction: 在专业烹饪的竞技运动中脱颖而出需要厚颜无耻的个性。女人只有在能承受压力的情况下才能晋升。在“革命”的最前线会见七位女厨师。It takes a brazen personality to excel in the competitive sport of professional cooking. A woman can only ascend the ranks if she can take the heat. Meet seven women chefs at the forefront of a "revolution."
